eyebrow: Surf School & Rentals ·<br class='mob-br'> Peniche · Supertubos · Baleal
hero_p: Small-group and private lessons with Pedro across Peniche’s best beaches — Supertubos, Baleal and beyond. He reads the swell and wind each day and picks the spot that fits your level best. Boards and wetsuits included.
lessons_h2: Pick your session — from first wave to fine-tuning
lesson1_p: Learn the basics in a small, friendly group. Theory, safety and your first waves — board and wetsuit included.
lesson2_p: One-on-one coaching tailored to you. The fastest way to progress, with Pedro adapting every session to your level.
lesson3_p: Already surfing? Let a local read the forecast and take you to the right peak at the right time around Peniche.
packs_cta_p: Looking for a custom package? Pedro puts together personalised packs based on your level, schedule and goals.
lesson4_p: Quality boards and wetsuits for every level, by the hour, day or week. Pick up, surf, repeat.
prices_p: Prices are per person and may vary with the season. Every surf lesson includes insurance, wetsuit, surfboard and transport to the best spot of the day.
prices_training_p: Guided sessions to the best spots with feedback and, when possible, video analysis — made for surfers who are already up and riding.
good_to_know: Good to know: ID or driver’s licence required · pick-up & return 9 AM–7 PM · payment in cash before use · gear returned in same condition.
damage: Damage / total loss: surfboard €30 / €350 · wetsuit €25 / €150. Rental use is the client’s responsibility; insurance does not cover rentals.
booking_h3: Ready to surf? Just send a quick email
booking_p: There’s no online booking system — simply email the lessons or gear you’d like, with your dates and level, and Pedro gets back to you fast.
about_h2: Meet Pedro — your coach and host
about_p1: Pedro started surfing at just 13 and has spent his life in the water at Peniche — turning that lifelong passion into patient, personal coaching. He founded Peniche On Surf back in 2014 and reads each surfer individually — your goals, your fears, your level — and tailors every session accordingly.
about_p2: He also runs the Supertubos West Surf bed & breakfast just a short hop away — so you can train and stay with the same welcoming spirit. And he is never far from Bala, his dog, who is always by his side and the good soul of the school.
reviews_rated: Rated 5.0 on Google — guests especially love Pedro’s lessons
stay_h2: Surf by day, sleep by the dunes
stay_p: Pair your lessons with a room at Supertubos West Surf — Pedro’s bed & breakfast, a 10-minute walk from the beach.
footer_tagline: Surf School & Rentals · Peniche · Supertubos · Baleal, Portugal
